ddt:Target.Name: Cluster_JFC_v2.30
ddt:Target.Description:
V2.30 MAJ : 08/12/2014 auteur : J-L LAFFONT (54 309) MAJ autoIdent pour SW 09.13 et 09.11
V2.16 MAJ : 26/09/2014 MAJ autoIdent pour SW 9.05 MAJ de la valeur par défaut BodyType = 0 (Phantom sequence) Passage en dossier de maintenabilité des requètes suivantes: OutputControl.Stop.Sound_Control : 2F010200 OutputControl.Start.Sound_Control : 2F0102030000 DataRead.OilLevel_CF : 22012B DataWrite.OilLevel_CF : 2E012B00 DataRead.CauseOfLastStopService : 22240F DataRead.AEBMMI_CF : 220150 DataWrite.AEBMMI_CF : 2E015000 DataRead.GAUOutputData :
V2.15 MAJ : 26/05/2014 Ajout sur le projet xZG et xZJ Ajout sur les projets xZH et xZI mise à jour autoIdent pour SW 8.01
V2.14 MAJ : 23/04/2014 prise en compte du CdC diag for JFC Version 2.21 (branch) Ajout Routine $310106 : ClearEngineeringInfo Intégration dans l'écran Mesure affichage :ERROR PROG / STOP /SERV / RESET de la Routine 31010106 : ClearEngineeringInfo Changement de la version de base JFC (2.14) dans les écrans Mesure affichage : Lecture Config jaugeage et Mesure jaugeage Ajout DID = $2410 (GAUOutputData)
V2.13 draft MAJ : 14/03/2014 ajout dans l'écran Mesure affichage : Ordinateur de bord de la lecture de la DID $0106 (TripComputerType_CF) ajout dans l'écran Mesure affichage : Ordinateur de bord de la routine RID $0103 (synchronisation odométrie) ajout du pilotage des buzzers 25, 30, 31, 32 ajout dans l'écran Mesure affichage : Mesure jaugeage de la lecture de la DID $F194 (systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber) ajout dans l'écran Mesure affichage : Mesure jaugeage de la version de base JFC Mise à jour des valeurs par défaut du jaugeage essence pour JFC V2 (PT1)(mail de CASALIS Erwan du 26 Février 2014) ajout dans l'écran Mesure affichage : Mesure jaugeage de la lecture des valeurs mémorisées L3; L2Off et LBackUpOff Intégration dans l'écran Mesure affichage : Execution Routine 3101 XXXX du stop routine 31020101 ajout dans l'écran Config Entretien : de OilLevel_CF DIDs $012B
V2.12 MAJ : 03/02/2014 prise en compte du CdC diag for JFC Version 2.1 Ajout DID = $0144 (DynamicTacho_CF (for global C)) Ajout de CauseOfLastTripComputerReset = 8 (SW reset (TCI _I loss)) supresssion de $1C dans les types de défaut liés à a DTC $9401 Ajout sur les projets xFA; xFB; xFD; xFG; xFF Ajout de l'autoident pour la D2 officielle
V2.10 20/12/2013 Ecran pour le jaugeage en 480x640 Lecture paramétres config jaugeage en 1 seul écran
V2.00 18/11/2013: prise en compte du CdC diag for JFC Version 2.0 Ajout DID = $0150 (AEBMMI_CF) Suppression du DayBacklightCompress Passage du DimmingStrategy_CF en ref
V1.09 23/10/2013: Mise en conformité des mnémonics des DIDs de $F010 à $F1A0 par rapport à la spec UDS Supression des DIDs $F182 et $F197 Changement d'affectation des zones dimming
V1.08 18/09/2013: prise en compte du CdC diag for JFC Version 2.0 prise en compte du CdC diag for JFC Version 1.9 Requete 22 21 01 (lecture TripDistanceKm) : Début de la donnée en Octet 4 bit 4 Requete 22 21 02 (lecture TripFuelUsed) : Début de la donnée en Octet 4 bit 4 Modification sur les valeurs par défaut des voyants autotestés Modification sur les valeurs par défaut des pages (empty, Nav, Audio et Mode) Ajout sur les écrans de la DID $240E "ClusterConfigurationError"
V1.07 12/07/2013: prise en compte du CdC diag for JFC Version 1.8 Modification sur DataRead.UCEPresent_CF passages des paramètres en DATARef Modification sur les tempo ouverture session après reset mesure NHU $2004 changement sur l'emplacement de données de la réponse prise en compte modification sur DID $0137 ("ClusterUserSetMenu_CF") Ajout de la DID $240F "CauseOfLastStopService"

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjt failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
High Side PWM outputs for backlight monitoring
High Side PWM outputs for backlight monitoring

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: OutputControlStatus
Data.Comment: Testing output : Status

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: VINDataIdentifier

Data.Name: networkConfB1
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN V

Data.Name: networkConfB2
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN V

Data.Name: networkConfB5
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN LSFT

Data.Name: networkConfB3
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN M

Data.Name: networkConfB4
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN M

Data.Name: networkConfB6
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN LSFT

Data.Name: networkConfB7
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN ELECT

Data.Name: Display_Control
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently the display(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Item.Text: Main display - All segments ON (if LCD) or white for TFT
Second display - All segments ON (if LCD) or white for TFT
Main display - All pixels ON color 1 (red)
Secondary display - All pixels ON color 1 (red)
Main display - All pixels ON color 2 (green)
Secondary display - All pixels ON color 2 (green)
Main display - All pixels ON color 3 (blue)
Secondary display - All pixels ON color 3 (blue)
Main display - inverted chess pattern ON
Secondary display - inverted chess pattern ON
Secondary display - grey shades pattern ON

Data.Name: Pointer_Control
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently pointer(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Data.Name: Backlight_Control
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently the backlight(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Data.Name: Language_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the language used for messages displayed.

Data.Name: GearBoxType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the GearBox type (manual or automatic) of the vehicle.

Data.Name: CarburationType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the carburation type of the vehicle.

Data.Name: DistanceUnit_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the mileage unit type (km or miles).

Data.Name: VolumeUnit_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the volume unit of the vehicle.

Data.Name: TripComputerType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the trip computer type displayed.

Data.Name: TyrePressureUnit_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the tyre pressure unit displayed.

Data.Name: CCSLACCServiceCustomer_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows type of speed control

Data.Name: ParkingBrakeType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the parking brake type (manual or assisted).

Data.Name: OverspeedWarningPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of overspeed warning (10204_1).

Data.Name: OilLevelMeasureTimeout_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the OIL LEVEL MEASURE TIMEOUT used during oil level measurement.

Data.Name: ClusterCurrentDistanceByDIAG
Data.Comment: This parameter allows R/W of the total current_distance (see EN_ODO_012), with a resolution of 1km.
Data.Description: This parameter allows R/W of the total current_distance (see EN_ODO_012), with a resolution of 1km. A write request is irreversible

Data.Name: L2displayed1_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone – Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: L2displayed2_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 2 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_2.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 1/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_2.

Data.Name: L2displayed3_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 3 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_3.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 2/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_3.

Data.Name: L2displayed4_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 4 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_4.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 3/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_4.

Data.Name: L2displayed5_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 5 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_5.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 4/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_5.

Data.Name: L2displayed6_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 6 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_6.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 5/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_6.

Data.Name: L2displayed7_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 7 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_7.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 6/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_7.

Data.Name: L2displayed8_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 8 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_8.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 7/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_8.

Data.Name: L2displayed9_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: VolumeFuelWarning_CF
Data.Comment: The "C_VALERTE_CARBURANT" parameter defines the threshold below low fuel level warning occurs.

Data.Name: FuelGaugingType_CF
Data.Comment: The "C_FUEL_GAUGING_TYPE" parameter defines the fuel gauging type, with fuel flow strategy or not
Data.Description: The “C_FUEL_GAUGING_TYPE” parameter defines the fuel gauging type, with fuel flow strategy or not (with fuel gauge sensor only).

Data.Name: TripDistanceKm
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: TripFuelUsed
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: TripTimer
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: L0Value
Data.Comment: This parameter is the measure of fuel gauge sensor converted in litre using Vx_FUNC_Rx table.

Data.Name: L0onValueDuringFuelReadjustment
Data.Comment: The "L0ON_VALUE_DURING_FUEL_UPDATE" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update wh
Data.Description: The “L0on_VALUE_during_fuel_update” parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Data.Name: L3ValueDuringFuelReadjustment
Data.Comment: The "L3_VALUE_DURING_FUEL_UPDATE" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update what
Data.Description: The “l3_value_during_fuel_update” parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Data.Name: L2offValueDuringFuelReadjustment
Data.Comment: The "L2OFF_VALUE_DURING_FUEL_UPDATE" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update w
Data.Description: The “L2off_VALUE_during_fuel_update” parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Data.Name: NumberResetsCausedByFailures
Data.Comment: The "NUMBER_RESETS_CAUSED_BY_FAILURES" parameter is used to count the number of resets caused by fai
Data.Description: The “number_resets_caused_by_failures” parameter is used to count the number of resets caused by failures (e.g. watchdog)

Item.Text: Sensor is out of range (NewOilLevel.Status = Invalid_Out_Of_Range)
Sensor is in open circuit (NewOilLevel.Status = Invalid_OC)
Sensor is in short circuit (NewOilLevel.Status = Invalid_SC)

Data.Name: HandBrakeState
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: BrakeFluidLevelState
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Item.Text: Circuit short to battery or open circuit
Open circuit (sensor disconnected) (possible only if NivocodSensorType_CF = 1)

Data.Name: WindscreenFluidLevel
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: OilLevelInput.DeltaU
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: OilLevelInput.VbattU2
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: OilLevelInput.U2
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: OilLevelInput.VbattU1
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: OilLevelInput.U1
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: FuelGaugeValue
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: BatteryVoltage
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Item.Text: Out of range (measured resistance doesn't match with defined resistance ranges)

Data.Name: ExternalECUDistanceBeforeOdoReadjustment
Data.Comment: The cluster stored distance before readjustment (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence,
Data.Description: The cluster stored distance before readjustment (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_036 and EN_ODO_040). The stored distance is the value of CAN received parameter before readjusting.

Data.Name: ClusterDistanceBeforeOdoReadjustment
Data.Comment: The cluster stores cluster current distance before readjustement (in case of CAN incoherence or Clus
Data.Description: The cluster stores cluster current distance before readjustement (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_036 and EN_ODO_040). The stored distance is the last value of cluster_current_distance calculated parameter before readjusting.

Data.Name: DistanceUpdateByDiagCounter
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance update number with DIAG request.

Data.Name: DistanceUpdateByExternalECUCounter
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU
Data.Description: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU (ABS or ECM) request (number of readjustment due to an cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_040).

Item.Text: Battery voltage too low or too high for measure (NewOilLevel.Status = Invalid_Power_Supply)
Measure is not possible because delay since Ignition OFF is less than 1 mn

Data.Name: UPAMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of UPAMMI

Item.Text: With front and rear UPA MMI

Data.Name: TPMSMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of TPMSMMI

Data.Name: FreeshiftManagement_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of freeShift management (20312_x).

Item.Text: With FreeShift + Without Symbol permanently Displayed
With FreeShift + With Symbol permanently Displayed

Data.Name: DriverStyleIndicationMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to active/deactive the ambilight ambiance.

Data.Name: ESCMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ESC

Data.Name: ExternalTemperature_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the external temperature management.
Data.Description: Note 1: When the “EXTERNAL_TEMPERATURE_PRESENT” parameter is at 01b, it means that External Temperature sensor acquisition is not managed directly by the cluster

Data.Name: LDWMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the MMI activation of LDW feature.
Data.Description: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilometer (ValConfigSeuilAlerte1_Km in 65450-2009-45-CDC_CLUSTER_X98).

Data.Name: MSCOilChgWarningThresholdKm_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilomet
Data.Description: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilometer (ValConfigSeuilAlerte1_Km in 65450-2009-45-CDC_CLUSTER_X98).

Item.Text: Present with OCS AND witht cluster internal counter

Data.Name: MSCServiceWarningThresholdKm_CF
Data.Description: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilometer (ValConfigSeuilAlerte1_Km in 65450-2009-45-CDC_CLUSTER_X98).

Data.Name: OilLevelMeasureTempThreshold_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the OIL LEVEL MEASURE TEMP THRESHOLD used during oil level measure

Data.Name: FrontSBRInhibition_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows the activation or not of Front Seat Belt Reminder warning (sound & Flashing)

Data.Name: DimingRheostat.R
Data.Comment: 0xFF = Unavailable

Data.Name: FuelReadjustmentNearFull.L0_CF
Data.Comment: The "C_RECALAGE_PLEIN" parameter is used to define 3 parameters (SeuilRecal_L0_Plein, SeuilRecal_L2_

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_ABS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ABS.

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_ACC
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ACC

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_AEBS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of AEBS

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_Airbag
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of AIRBAG ECU.

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_APB
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of APB

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_AT
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_BIC_RadNAv_CANV
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of BIC_RadNAv_CANV

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_BSW
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of BSW

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_ECall
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECall

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_ECM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ECM

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_EMM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of EMM

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_EPS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ALS.

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_ESC
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ESC

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_EVC
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of EVC

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_Front Camera
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of Front Camera

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_HEPS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of HEPS

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_HFM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of HFM

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_HFP
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of HFP

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_LBCS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of LBCS

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_Magic Folding_rear seat
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of Magic Folding_rear seat

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_Multimedia_CANM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of Multimedia_CANM

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_RCU
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of RCU

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_TCU
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of TCU

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_TPMS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of TPMS

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_UPA
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of UPA

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_USM
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of USM

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_VADA
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of VADA

Data.Name: Simul_appui_ADAC.Button
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently pointer(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Data.Name: CauseOfLastTripComputerReset
Data.Comment: CauseOfLastTripComputerRese

Item.Text: Overflow of Electrical consumption value (EV specific)

Data.Name: BodyType.HMI_Variant_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the body type.

Data.Name: networkConfB8
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN ELECT

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: systemSupplierIdentifierDataIdentifier

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumberDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Comment: ECUSerialNumberDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: OutputControlCommand
Data.Comment: Input Output control parameter list

Data.Name: WelcomeSequenceInhibition_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to activate or deactivate the welcome sequence

Data.Name: Teltalles Control
Data.Comment: Telltalescontrol parameter list

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_4x4 ETS
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of 4_4

Item.Text: Mode page depends on current skin
Mode page fixed on instant/mean consumption

Data.Name: UTAMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to (de)activate the UTA MMI (UTA ADAC page

Data.Name: TypeApprovalNumber
Data.Comment: exhaustRegulationOrTypeApprovalNumberDataIdentifier

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Comment: identificationOptionVehicleManufacturerSpecific

Data.Name: Supply voltage
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Item.Text: Synchronization of the total distance between Cluster ECU and external ECU

Data.Name: RoutineStatusRecord.RoutineInfo
Data.Comment: Routine information

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: ProgrammingOperationFingerprint
Data.Comment: vehicleManufacturerSpecific

Data.Name: OperationalReference
Data.Comment: OperationalReference

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF.Presence_4WheelSteering
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of 4WheelSteering

Data.Name: OilLevel_CF
Data.Comment: Présence mesure niveau d'huile

Data.Name: ExtendedGripMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to (de)activate the UTA MMI (UTA ADAC page

Item.Text: Type 1 (20409_1 JFC type & No display of 20409_2 and 20409_3)
Type 2 (20409_1 HFE type & display of 20409_2 and 20409_3 allowed)

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF_bench_def
Data.Comment: 1er octet des configs UCE

Data.Name: UCEPresent_CF_bench_sans_AT
Data.Comment: 1er octet des configs UCE

Data.Name: Fault recovery datation
Data.Comment: Fault recovery datation

Data.Name: Occurrence fault counter
Data.Comment: Occurrence fault counter

Data.Name: DynamicTacho_CF
Data.Comment: DynamicTacho_CF (for global C)

Item.Text: Display corresponds to the stored EEPROM value
L2 is initialized with FuelReadjust.L2ZeroSpeed_CF threshold
L2 is initialized with FuelReadjust.L2offL0_CF threshold
L2 is initialized with FuelReadjust.L0L3_CF threshold
L2 is initialized with Diag request
L2 is initialized with Backup.VolumeFuelWarning_CF threshold

Data.Name: GAUOutputData.L2offValue
Data.Comment: Valeur de L2 mémorisée à la coupure APC

Data.Name: GAUOutputData.L3Value
Data.Comment: Valeur de L0 mémorisée 12 Secondes après vitesse nulle

Data.Name: GAUOutputData.LBackUpoffValue
Data.Comment: Valeur de LBackUp mémorisée à la coupure APC

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: CountryHMISpecificity_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used adapt cluster HMI to some market/regulation constraints

Item.Text: Trip Unit has been correctly configured
Trip Unit has not been correctly configured

Data.Name: BootVersion
Data.Comment: BootSoftwareIdentificationDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last service alert
Data.Comment: BUIC line number related to last service alert (MBD parameter : CauseService)

Data.Name: CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last stop alert
Data.Comment: BUIC line number related to last stop alert (MBD parameter : CauseStop)

Item.Text: CAN V MM frame received while ClusterUserSetMenu_CF != 0 (mute emission of UserSetPref_Rx)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataWrite.GaugingThreshold
Request.Comment: The "C_SEUILS" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (SEUIL_H and SEUIL_B)

Request.Name: DataRead.S1
Request.Comment: The "C_S1" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS1 and kMajS1)

Request.Name: DataWrite.S1
Request.Comment: The "C_S1" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS1 and kMajS1)

Request.Name: DataRead.S2
Request.Comment: The "C_S2" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS2 and kMajS2)

Request.Name: DataWrite.S2
Request.Comment: The "C_S2" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS2 and kMajS2)

Request.Name: DataRead.S3
Request.Comment: The "C_S3" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS3 and kMajS3)

Request.Name: DataWrite.S3
Request.Comment: The "C_S3" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS3 and kMajS3)

Request.Name: DataWrite.FrontSBRInhibition_CF
Request.Comment: Careful, don't display this action on a screen

Request.Name: DataRead.GaugingThreshold
Request.Comment: The "C_SEUILS" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (SEUIL_H and SEUIL_B)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Request.Name: RoutineControl.To zero Trip Computer Variables and L2 LBackUp updates
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "To zero ADAC simulation command + L2 and LBackUp updates" routine, Routine ID = $01

Request.Name: RoutineControl.Synchronization of the total DISTANCE between Cluster ECU and external ECU
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "Synchronization of the total DISTANCE between Cluster ECU and external ECU" routine, Routine ID = $03

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: DataRead.Odometer of the first occurence
Request.Comment: Read Odometer of the first occurence

Request.Name: RoutineControl.Return to initial configuration
Request.Comment: CLUSTER shall perform "Return to initial configuration" following details below, Routine ID = $04

Request.Name: RoutineControl.Oil drain reset
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "the maintenance schedule reset" routine, Routine ID = $02.

Request.Name: RoutineControl.Service reset
Request.Comment: CLUSTER shall perform "Service Reset" following details below, Routine ID = $05

Request.Name: DataRead.CauseOfLastStopService
Request.Comment: Read CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last service alert

DataItem.Name: CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last service alert
CauseOfLastStopService.BUIC line number related to last stop alert

Request.Name: DataRead.Odometer of the last occurence
Request.Comment: Read Odometer of the last occurence

Request.Name: RoutineControl.STOP_To zero Trip Computer Variables and L2 LBackUp updates
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "To zero ADAC simulation command + L2 and LBackUp updates" routine, Routine ID = $01

Request.Name: RoutineControl.ClearEngineeringInfo
Request.Comment: CLUSTER shall perform "Service Reset" following details below, Routine ID = $05

Device.Name: High Side PWM outputs for backlight monitoring

RoutineControl.STOP_To zero Trip Computer Variables and L2 LBackUp updates
